(a) The department may enter into an interlocal contract with one or more local governments in accordance with Chapter 791 (Interlocal Cooperation Contracts) , Government Code.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.010 — Authority to Contract

(a) The department may enter into an interlocal contract with one or more local governments in accordance with Chapter 791 (Interlocal Cooperation Contracts) , Government Code.

(b) The board by rule shall adopt policies and procedures consistent with applicable state procurement practices for soliciting and awarding a contract under this section.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290 (H.B.2017), Sec. 35, eff. September 1, 2011.*
